name: borrower-contact-broker-correction-wins
rationale: Broker initial intake states borrower_phone '780-555-0142' and email 'marcus.webb@example.com'. loan_application doc shows older phone '780-555-0099'. Broker correction asserts the older phone is stale; use '780-555-0142'. F1.CT canonical-map resolves to broker_correction tier for borrower_phone field. Tests F1.CT contact-field source-hierarchy analogously to A01 (LA broker_correction).
notes: Two-event sequence. Borrower contact information includes phone + email — broker is authoritative for current contact info.
